'''Ivatch''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector's]]<ref name="TDC" /> [[Ivatch system/Legends|Ivatch system]],<ref name="DarkStryder note" /> located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Connected to the neighboring planets of [[Shintel]] and [[Peirs]] by [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]], Ivatch supported a small colony whose economy was based around supplying [[Ore/Legends|ore]] and natural resources to [[Gandle Ott]].<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ivatch was featured in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]]. Ivatch was not featured directly in any adventure, but was included to give background information on worlds within the Kathol sector.<ref name="TDC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ivatch system, and therefore the planet Ivatch, in grid square M-21.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
